prompt:
Reference image role: the blog list prototype shows our blog thumbnail style — small ink-wash paintings fused with technical metaphors, dark muted palette, painterly soft edges, suitable as 16:9 thumbnails on dark cards. PRESERVE this style.

Create a 16:9 blog thumbnail for article "Triton 与 CUDA 核心原理整理". NO text.

Subject: Traditional Chinese ink-wash painting style (水墨写意): two layered ink-wash mountain ranges fading into mist, and floating between them in the upper-right a single softly glowing translucent cube made of faint cyan #9CF0BD light and golden grid lines #C0A35D suggesting a GPU compute kernel. The mountains are painted in soft grey-black brush strokes on warm-aged-paper ground.

Style: Brush-painted, soft, atmospheric, low contrast, suggests "ancient wisdom meets modern compute". Background warm parchment-ish #2a3128 (slightly green-tinted so it sits well on dark cards). The cube is the only modern element — everything else is ink-wash.

Color HEX: ink black #1a1d1c, mist grey #3a4540, paper warm #2a3128, cyan glow #9CF0BD, gold lines #C0A35D.

Avoid: real text, characters, photographic realism, oversaturated colors, neon, red, purple, modern digital illustration, cartoonish, MMORPG game UI.
